DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `admin`;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin` (
  `id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nom` varchar(80) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(150) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `mot_de_passe` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('super_admin','moderateur','support') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'moderateur',

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `email` (`email`)

  `note` tinyint UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `commentaire` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `id_reservation` (`id_reservation`),

--
-- Structure de la table `reservation`
--

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `reservation`;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reservation` (
  `id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `id_voiture` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `id_locataire` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `date_debut` date NOT NULL,
  `date_fin` date NOT NULL,
  `nb_jours` smallint UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `prix_total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `caution_payee` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `statut` enum('en_attente','confirmee','en_cours','terminee','annulee','refusee') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'en_attente',
  `message` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `motif_annulation` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `id_voiture` (`id_voiture`),
  KEY `id_locataire` (`id_locataire`),
  KEY `idx_resa_dates` (`date_debut`,`date_fin`),
  KEY `idx_resa_statut` (`statut`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `utilisateur`;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `utilisateur` (
  `id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nom` varchar(80) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `prenom` varchar(80) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(150) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `mot_de_passe` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `telephone` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

  `ville` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

  `est_proprietaire` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',

  `actif` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

--
-- Structure de la table `voiture`
--

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `voiture`;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `voiture` (
  `id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `id_proprietaire` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `id_type` int UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `marque` varchar(60) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `modele` varchar(80) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `annee` year NOT NULL,
  `couleur` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `immatriculation` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `kilometrage` int UNSIGNED DEFAULT '0',
  `carburant` enum('essence','diesel','electrique','hybride','gpl') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `boite_vitesse` enum('manuelle','automatique') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nb_places` tinyint UNSIGNED DEFAULT '5',
  `prix_par_jour` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL,
  `caution` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `ville` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `adresse` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `latitude` decimal(10,7) DEFAULT NULL,
  `longitude` decimal(10,7) DEFAULT NULL,
  `disponible` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `verifie` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `note_moyenne` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `description` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `immatriculation` (`immatriculation`),
  KEY `id_proprietaire` (`id_proprietaire`),
  KEY `id_type` (`id_type`),
  KEY `idx_voiture_ville` (`ville`,`disponible`),
  KEY `idx_voiture_prix` (`prix_par_jour`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
